subject: Fermi  trigger No 721204446: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:

MASTER-Tunka robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in Russia (Applied Physics Institute, Irkutsk State University) started inspect of the Fermi GRB231109.27 (trigger No 721204446,11h 32m 09.60s , +50d 39m 36.0s, R=6.78) errorbox  33843 sec after notice time and 33877 sec after trigger time at 2023-11-09 15:58:38 UT, with upper limit up to  18.4 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 68 deg. The sun  altitude  is -54.3 deg. 

MASTER-Tavrida robotic telescope  located in Russia (Lomonosov MSU, SAI Crimea astronomical station) started inspect of the Fermi GRB231109.27 errorbox  35379 sec after notice time and 35412 sec after trigger time at 2023-11-09 16:24:14 UT, with upper limit up to  17.9 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 80 deg. The sun  altitude  is -21.9 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = 63 deg., longitude l = 150 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=2298669

We obtain a following upper limits.
